The [[Salford City Reds]] played in [[Super League XVIII]] during the 2013 season. This was the 18th season of the Super League era.

Prior to the season the club looked to be folding until [[Dr Marwan Koukash|Marwan Koukash]] took it over from [[John Wilkinson (entrepreneur)|John Wilkinson]] in January 2013.<ref name=Ind270113>{{cite news |title=Saving Salford gives much-needed boost |author=Hadfield, Dave |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/general/rugby-league/saving-salford-gives-muchneeded-boost-8468476.html |newspaper=[[The Independent]] |date=27 January 2013 |accessdate=8 May 2013|author-link=Dave Hadfield }}</ref>

Reds' first game of the [[Super League XVIII|2013 Super League]] was a 0-42 home defeat by [[Wigan Warriors]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/salford-vs-wigan/37064|title=Super League: Sam Tomkins stars as Wigan Warriors crush Salford City Reds in season opener|work=[[Sky Sports]]|date=2 February 2013|access-date=23 February 2024}}</ref>
